title: (Bearish Signal) JMIA, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on Feb 09, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that JMIA's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 17 similar cases where JMIA's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 16 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $66.88 is above $41.80 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 01/07/21 - 02/09/21, the price experienced a +73% Uptrend. During the week of 02/02/21 - 02/09/21, the stock enjoyed a +7% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/ka1kpbu6qog61.png?width=1534&format=png&auto=webp&s=fee43716f6994cb31b05af57080d12f9030b94b5

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator demonstrated that the stock has entered the overbought zone. This may point to a price pull-back soon.

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 16 of 19 cases where JMIA's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 84%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where JMIA declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 90%.

JMIA broke above its upper Bollinger Band on January 22, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9212856-jumia-technologies-ag-adr-jmia-65-49-rsi-indicator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-february-09-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
